'''Meldazar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was visited by [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Ferus Olin]], sometime before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
